description: A study evaluating cardiovascular outcomes in patients with Type 2 Diabetes and early-stage chronic kidney disease.
inclusion_criteria: Patient must have a diagnosis of Type 2 Diabetes Mellitus
Patient must have Chronic Kidney Disease (CKD) stage 3 or earlier
Patient must be on at least one antidiabetic medication
Patient age must be between 40 and 75 years
exclusion_criteria: Patient must NOT have active cancer or malignancy
Patient must NOT have had a recent stroke or subarachnoid hemorrhage
Patient must NOT be on immunosuppressive therapy
Patient must NOT have severe heart failure
